title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 198.424 - No effect upon tax-exempt status
text:
198.424.  No effect upon tax-exempt status. — Nothing in sections 198.401 to 198.436 shall be deemed to affect or in any way limit the tax-exempt or nonprofit status of any nursing facility granted by state law.
(L. 1994 H.B. 1362 § 9) 
Expires 9-30-29; see § 198.439
